name: lss_farm_panel_repair_scheduler
description: Solar farm real-time monitoring system features :  1. Load / Generate Sensor Dataset (200,000 panels); 2. Start Real-Time Monitoring System; 3. Search Panel by ID; 4. View Top-K Worst Panels (Maintenance Priority) 5. View Fault Summary Statistics 0. Exit

scripts.start-all: concurrently "(cd ./scripts/ && node server.js)" "(cd ./scripts/ && node PanelSimulation.js)" "(cd ./scripts/ && node rankPanel.js)" "(cd ./scripts/ && node statistics.js)"
scripts.start-stream: concurrently "(cd ./scripts/ && node PanelSimulation.js)" "(cd ./scripts/ && node statistics.js)" "(cd ./scripts/ && node rankPanel.js)"
